component.name: argus-kali-network
component.description: ARGUS sandbox image — Backlog/dev1_md §4.17 (network protocol exploitation: SNMP, LDAP, IKE, SMB, IMPACKET, BloodHound). Pinned tooling, USER 65532, no SUID introduction, HEALTHCHECK present.

properties.name: argus:sbom:source-of-truth
properties.value: /usr/share/doc/sbom.cdx.json (baked into runtime image at build time via _shared/generate_sbom.sh)

components.name: argus-kali-network-placeholder
components.description: Committed stub. Real CycloneDX components materialise inside the image at /usr/share/doc/sbom.cdx.json (dpkg-query fallback or syft) during `docker build` and are extracted by CI into the GitHub Actions artifact `sbom-network`. Do NOT treat this file as authoritative — it exists only so that `docs_tool_catalog.py` and `tests/integration/sandbox/test_image_security_contract.py` can validate the JSON envelope offline (no docker daemon required).
